title: ThermalPalette constants
notes: All colors as [f32; 4] RGBA in palette.rs

title: wgpu context helpers
notes: WgpuContext struct in wgpu_ctx.rs. Bundles Instance/Adapter/Device/Queue with async new(). cargo check passes.

title: Text renderer abstraction
notes: ThermalTextRenderer in text.rs. Wraps glyphon 0.7 FontSystem/SwashCache/TextAtlas/TextRenderer/Viewport. Used wgpu23 alias to resolve glyphon 0.7 vs wgpu 24 version mismatch. cargo check passes.

title: Common geometry types
notes: Point/Size/Rect in geometry.rs with split_horizontal, split_vertical, grid, to_ndc, contains, center. cargo check passes.

title: Thermal gradient generator
notes: Added thermal_gradient_lut, thermal_gradient_f32, heat_label to palette.rs. Re-exported from lib.rs. cargo check passes.
